====Pokémon====
N refuses to call the Pokémon he befriends "his Pokémon", instead naming them "his friends".

|desc={{p|Purrloin}} is the first Pokémon seen in N's possession. It is stolen by {{tc|Team Plasma Grunt}}s attempting to win N's favor, yet not knowing they are stealing it from N. Shin helps N defeat Togari and get it back. Later, he uses it to deliver a letter to Togari.

None of Purrloin's moves are known.}}

{{p|Zekrom}} is N's second known Pokémon. Atop [[Dragonspiral Tower]], it responds to N's commitment to his ideals and allows him to befriend it. He later uses it to destroy the Pokémon League and battle against Shin.}}
